гҖҖгҖҖAbout the recent dig in New Mexico where they uncovered a large amount of Atari games that were liquidated from AtariвҖҷs old plant in El Paso, Texas. Around 700,000 games in total are buried in the landfill, including games like Missile Command, Haunted House, Centipede, Asteroids and many others.
introduction: About the recent dig in New Mexico where they uncovered a large amount of Atari games that were liquidated from AtariвҖҷs old plant in El Paso, Texas. Around 700,000 games in total are buried in the landfill, including games like Missile Command, Haunted House, Centipede, Asteroids and many others.
